---
name: setup
description: Inject archivist rules into the project CLAUDE.md
---

# Archivist Setup

Inject archivist behavior rules into the project's `CLAUDE.md`.

## Steps

1. **Read the project CLAUDE.md** — read `CLAUDE.md` at the project root (create it if it doesn't exist)

2. **Check existing section** — if a `## Archivist` section already exists, remove it entirely (it will be regenerated)

3. **Generate the archivist block** — use this exact format:

```markdown
## Archivist

<!-- Generated by /archivist:setup — do not edit manually -->

After a `git push`, ask the user:

```
Archive this push? [Y/n]
```

If accepted, delegate to the archivist agent:

```
Agent(subagent_type="archivist:Archivist", prompt="Index the latest git push in <PROJECT>. Run: git log --oneline -5, git branch --show-current, git diff --stat HEAD~5..HEAD. Then index the summary with source=git-push and topic=<PROJECT>.")
```
```

4. **Write the block** — insert the `## Archivist` section in the project CLAUDE.md (append at end, or replace if it already existed).

5. **Report** — confirm to the user that the archivist rules were added.
